Subject: No. of 20$ bills
Description: On initial startup, the atm accepts 0 number of 20$ bills, which isn't a valid positive number of bills

Subject: Card #
Description: Card numbers are off by 1, i.e. Card #1 is mislabeled as Card #2 in the receipt and the same for Card #2\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-22.11.24.png]\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-22.12.10.png]

Subject: Withdrawal limit
Description: An arbitrary daily withdrawal limit is set, no mention of which has been made in the given specifications\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.59.53.png]

Subject: typo_2
Description: INSUFFICIENT misspelled as INSUFICIENT while withdrawing from money market\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.53.59.png]

Subject: Hidden Transfer fee
Description: No mention of 0.50$ transfer fee in the specs.\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.31.15.png]\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.31.25.png]

Subject: Hidden deposit fee
Description: A hidden 10$ deposit fee is deducted during deposits\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.42.52.png]

Subject: Typo_1
Description: WOOD instead of WOULD in the "would you like to do another transaction"\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.37.43.png]

Subject: Transfer: accounts swapped
Description: The from and to accounts are swapped on the receipt during transfer\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.33.18.png]\nOriginally asked for a transfer from the savings account to the checking account.

Subject: Inquiry: unknown deposit to savings
Description: On inquiry to the money market account of card #1 an unknown error occurs and an amount of 500$ is deposited to the money market account.\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.32.13.png]

Subject: Wrong account label on receipt, on inquiry on money market account
Description: On performing an inquiry on the money market account, in addition to the unknown error, the receipt denotes that an inquiry has been made on the Savings account.\n![image][pasted-2026.03.12-21.29.31.png]

Subject: Withdrawal amount mismatch with labels
Description:
The amounts do not match
20$ maps to 40$, 
40->60, 
60->100, 
100->200.
